title: rishika-ss
description: Hi, I’m Rishika  an AI student and developer.   I work on building intelligent systems, solving complex problems, and creating projects that have real-world impact.   Always learning, always evolving.
summary: 该内容是一位名为Rishika的AI学生和开发者的个人简介，她专注于构建智能系统、解决复杂问题并创造有实际影响力的项目，强调持续学习和进化。
